Title: datediff
Description:
datediff subtracts date1 from date2 and returns the difference as
    an integer in the specified units.
Examples:
SQL> SELECT datediff ('hour',  stringdate ('1996.10.10'), stringdate ('1996.10.11'));
callret
INTEGER
24
1 Rows. -- 57 msec.

SQL> use "Demo";
SQL> SELECT avg (datediff ('day', "OrderDate", "ShippedDate"))
  as "Avg_Processing_Time" from "Orders" where "ShippedDate" is not null;
Avg_Processing_Time
INTEGER
8
1 Rows. -- 11 msec.
